name: YTMusicianship
description: AI-powered YouTube Music automation with true shuffle, playlist generation, and automatic taste ranking.

tools.name: list_playlists
tools.description: List the user's YouTube Music playlists.

tools.name: get_playlist_tracks
tools.description: Get all tracks in a playlist. Use limit=0 for no limit.

tools.name: search_yt_music
tools.description: Search YouTube Music for songs, albums, or artists.

tools.name: true_shuffle_playlist
tools.description: True-shuffle an entire playlist. Fetches all tracks, shuffles them, creates a new playlist with the shuffled order, and deletes the old playlist if owned.

tools.name: add_tracks_to_playlist
tools.description: Add one or more tracks to a playlist by their video IDs.

tools.name: remove_tracks_from_playlist
tools.description: Remove one or more tracks from a playlist by their video IDs.

tools.name: generate_playlist
tools.description: Create a new playlist from a list of video IDs chosen by the AI or user.

tools.name: sync_history
tools.description: Sync listening history from YouTube Music and recompute rankings.

tools.name: get_top_songs
tools.description: Get the top-ranked songs based on listening history and likes.

tools.name: get_top_artists
tools.description: Get the top-ranked artists based on listening history and likes.

tools.name: get_song_ranking
tools.description: Get the computed ranking score for a specific song by video ID.

tools.name: create_scheduled_job
tools.description: Create a scheduled job. Actions: 'shuffle' or 'sync_history'. Cron is a 5-field string like '0 8 * * 1' for Monday 8am.

tools.name: delete_scheduled_job
tools.description: Delete a scheduled job by its ID.
